headline: A Look At FedEx (FDX) Valuation After Earnings Beat Guidance Hike And AI Efficiency Push
summary: Why FedEx’s latest quarter matters for investors FedEx (FDX) just delivered quarterly results that topped consensus earnings and revenue expectations, raised its full-year revenue growth outlook to 6.0% to 6.5%, and highlighted momentum from AI-driven efficiencies and new services like FedEx SameDay Local. See our latest analysis for FedEx. Even after an earnings driven jump earlier in the month, FedEx’s share price has cooled with a 9.6% 1 month share price return. However, a 17.9% 3 month...
